57563.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57563.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57564.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
57564.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

57565.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
57565.description: It's '80s month here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

57566.title: Forever 80s
57566.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

57567.title: Electric 80s!
57567.description: Tune in as we play all of the biggest electronic hits from the 80s!

57568.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
57568.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

57569.title: ... So 80s!
57569.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
